# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs on shared runners and executes custom build scripts from repository. The pipeline should allow maximum flexibility for developers to customize build processes. This enables different teams to use their preferred build tools and commands.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - test
  - package
  - deploy

default:
  tags: []
  before_script:
    - chmod +x ci/*.sh 2>/dev/null || true

variables:
  GIT_STRATEGY: fetch

workflow:
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE'
      when: always

.build_template: &build_template
  image: alpine:latest
  rules:
    - exists:
        - ci/build.sh
        - ci/test.sh
        - ci/package.sh
        - ci/deploy.sh
      when: on_success
    - when: manual
  artifacts:
    when: always
    expire_in: 1 week
    paths:
      - dist/
      - build/
      - out/
      - reports/
      - artifacts/

build:
  stage: build
  <<: *build_template
  script:
    - |
      if [ -x ci/build.sh ]; then
        ci/build.sh
      elif [ -f ci/build.sh ]; then
        sh ci/build.sh
      else
        echo "No ci/build.sh found, skipping build."
      fi

test:
  stage: test
  <<: *build_template
  needs: ["build"]
  script:
    - |
      if [ -x ci/test.sh ]; then
        ci/test.sh
      elif [ -f ci/test.sh ]; then
        sh ci/test.sh
      else
        echo "No ci/test.sh found, skipping test."
      fi

package:
  stage: package
  <<: *build_template
  needs: ["test"]
  script:
    - |
      if [ -x ci/package.sh ]; then
        ci/package.sh
      elif [ -f ci/package.sh ]; then
        sh ci/package.sh
      else
        echo "No ci/package.sh found, skipping package."
      fi

deploy:
  stage: deploy
  <<: *build_template
  needs: ["package"]
  script:
    - |
      if [ -x ci/deploy.sh ]; then
        ci/deploy.sh
      elif [ -f ci/deploy.sh ]; then
        sh ci/deploy.sh
      else
        echo "No ci/deploy.sh found, skipping deploy."
      fi
  environment:
    name: production
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'
      when: manual
    - when: never
